reviews.review_description: The game is fairly short, but very fun to play. The story is okay, but the art style is amazingly fun! It is pure eye candy. The only problem I've noticed is that the noise when switching from yellow robot to green or pink is glitched and it is very loud even at one notch of volume. It would be nice if you could fix that.
I really enjoyed this game - mostly finding things in mazes, but great fun and lovely art.

This game has a really unique art style. It isn't just skin deep either, the art style extends into the modeling of objects as well. Hard to explain and looks and feels different in-game than in the trailer.

While it is short and most of the puzzles are relatively easy and reminiscent of the start of Portal, there's an engaging story and narrator. I found it to be well worth the price, really enjoyed it, and highly recommend it.
I really enjoyed this game's fun puzzles and story line. The artwork made it enjoyably unique. Give it a try!

I really enjoyed this puzzle adventure. Excellent voice acting from the amusing AI companion, and the robots were charming. I especially loved the soothing garden rooms and the colorful rainbow rooms. The puzzle difficulty was just right for this gentle, playful, almost dream-like experience.

developer_response.body: We're really happy to hear the experience resonated with you, It means a lot! Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: Looking forward to more from this studio
reviews.review_description: Enjoyed the stylized art style, puzzles, & story. The Metroidvania type gameplay was a nice change of pace compared to all the shooters we get these days. Don't expect this to outstay it's welcome as you can finish it in a couple hours. Really hope we see more from this team in the near future ❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much — that really means a lot to us. 
We're currently working on My Monsters, a new hand-painted VR adventure, check it here: https://www.meta.com/experiences/my-monsters/9400542766635529

reviews.review_description:
Just finished the game, and was happy I played it! It has some neat mechanics that build as you go, adding new functions and abilities. I'm not the best at puzzle games, and it took me about 4 hours, but I only needed to look at a walkthrough once to figure out how to advance (and that was only because there was a glitch toward the end where the platform a robot was on didn't stay lowered after I threw the switch in the other room, and I thought it did something else). The interactions with the robots were fun, especially when they gripe at you and shove you backwards if you get too close. 

The story was all right. I couldn't fault the AI for being the way it was, since it was trained by humans, after all, so understandably could apply a code of morality to what are essentially machines working in a factory. One could argue that by helping the AI in its quest, you are corrupting the machines. I was viewing the situation differently than the AI did: robots doing their jobs until broken, robots rightly rejecting other kinds of robots that were in the wrong area, removing batteries from robots as a neutral mechanical act rather than an act of violence. But it's still interesting to know the AI's point of view in the story. It's funny that it wasn't considered sexual harassment when a robot would become enamored of you and invade your personal space as a stalker XD. 

I loved the animation style and the music was pretty good. Sometimes I need to turn music off, but this music added to the overall environment. At times, the movement was clunky, like when trying to grab things to climb. It helps to make sure you hear the grab sound before trying to move up. A few times I was worried about not being able to reach things, since, at 5'5", some distances were a stretch. But not too many problems in the game itself. 

Anyway, I recommend this unique VR game for a relaxing puzzle with no rush or real danger, even if the AI tries to hurry you along.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful review! We’re glad you enjoyed the game and had fun with the mechanics and interactions. We also appreciate your feedback about the story and gameplay—it’s always great to hear different perspectives! We’ll keep improving based on comments like yours. Thanks again for playing and sharing your experience!

reviews.review_description:
The game was entertaining and the drawing style looks very pretty.

One thing to note is that if you are prone to motionsickness check out the options to tune the movement. Would have been nice to have a popup or something to enable motionsickness reducing controls. Now I only realized I needed to tune them when I started feeling sick.

Only big downside is some weird bugs/glitches that hindered movement. For example in one of the overhead bar ladderthingies some of the handles were ungrippable causing you to fall down. On another occasion I did not see a way out so had to walk through a wall or step over an edge to drop down :/

In the end the game was entertaining, but not perfect

developer_response.body: Hi Robsato! Thanks for the review! We are very proud of UNBINARY's artistic style and it's great to hear you enjoyed it! We're working on a post-launch content and we will check this bugs you mention!

reviews.review_description:
Unbinary is an amazing hand-painted adventure puzzler on the Meta Quest platform. Its graphics are truly stunning and take full advantage of the Quest's hardware. In the game you'll be solving puzzles, interacting with colorful robots, and overall just having a blast! I really enjoyed my time with the game. It felt super unique compared to a lot of other Quest titles and it stuck with me after playing. Of course there were some problems with it, most notably a few bugs, but overall I found it to be a great game! I definitely recommend it.

My full review: https://youtu.be/oPiHOUHjrpA

developer_response.body: Hi Nerdburglar, so nice to know that you enjoyed our game! We believe the recent update we have just released has fixed the bugs you mentioned. Thank you for your review, you know how much it means to us! (｡◕‿◕｡)

reviews.review_description:
It will be an amazing game just figured I would share my problems I run into.
1. When I turn off the subtitles it changes everything to a different language even when set to English. 


Well all my other "problems" been fixed.
It is so nice to see a developer actually read the reviews. A lot of games get dropped on here a left.

Only suggestion I have now is maybe raise the price......lol
We need more games like this. The art work is amazing.

developer_response.body: Hi Christian! We are always very interested in hearing what players have to say and we really appreciate your review! We have great news to share: we have just released an update that fixed this issue with the subtitles you mentioned! Thanks for the kind words! =)

reviews.review_description: The storyline was astonishing and completely unpredictable. I am so happy I bought this game. People who say it’s laggy and has bugs their Wi-Fi must be dog water.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the awesome feedback! We're so glad you enjoyed the story and had a good time playing. Appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
Had a wonderful time playing through this beautiful, hand crafted game! It reminded me a lot of Portal with its "test chambers," off-screen AI narrator, and the slow layering of mechanics and complexity as you progress.

The graphics are wonderfully hand drawn and add a lot to the experience. The Quest hardware is limited and this is an example of using that limitation to create something wonderfully unique. The sound design is also pretty great and the game mechanics feel refined and fluid.

The puzzles themselves ramp up in difficulty but never really get that challenging. I would have loved a bit longer of a game that took another step with the mechanics but overall I can't complain. It was a wonderful ride for the price that I highly recommend.

developer_response.body: Hi Thomas, We're glad you liked our game! Thanks for playing and your feedbacks! We're working on a post-launch content with more levels. So come back when possible!

reviews.review_description: Alright so this game’s gameplay isn’t anything special, it has really cool mechanics like the masks but otherwise it’s fairly simple. But apart from that this game is probably the best I’ve got on the oculus and I recommend it to everyone for the story alone. I won’t spoil anything but just know if you’re on the fence about getting it. Do it, it’s so worth it. Not much replay ability but that doesn’t matter because the first time is the only one you need to experience this amazing game. Buy it and see for yourself why it’s so great.

developer_response.body: Hi Skeletonhero, Thanks for the kind words! Glad you liked our game! Thanks for playing and for your feedback! We're very proud of our plot, when we received feedback like yours, it worth all the development of the game!

reviews.review_description: Apart from the condescending tone of the voice I found the game to be quite uneventful and boring

developer_response.body:
Webby is definitely unique! That's why she needs your help, autonomous user, to improve and be able to rule the planet! Anyway, thank you so much for giving us a chance! The start of the game for some more advanced players can be easy, that's true, but maybe, just maybe, you haven't played all the way? Don't get me wrong, no spoilers here, but things get a lot more interesting after the beginning =]
In any case, your opinion is very welcome and precious to us, if you want to share a little more about your experience we would love to hear, so we can improve in the next updates: Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/9YXeFsBBJ2

reviews.review_description:
If you are wanting a beautiful narritive puzzle adventure games in a stunning hand painting world then UNBINARY is the game for you!

This is a game that will get you thinking, not just about the puzzles but about life and how we interact with each other.

Stunning visuals, compelling story and fantastic voice acting!

To see and learn more, check out my video here: https://youtu.be/MQCyR4v-8rc

developer_response.body: Hi GameOnScorpio, We are very proud of UNBINARY's artistic style and it's great to hear you enjoyed it! And the plot is not everyone that gets it, =D! Thank you so much for your words and the review!

reviews.review_description: Don't sleep on this challenging (but not frustrating) puzzler, in an original and colorful world

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed the challenge! Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Handcrafted Graphics and beautiful enviroment to explore with!

Cool movement and robots are well made! Puzzles are some what difficult not too much or too little.

You can expect to finish this in two hours when you look around things and explore. 

Also there is minor bugs like things don't load up when you continue your progress but it is fixed by restarting level up

In my opinion this game is well priced and length is good too not too little or too much!

Would buy it for sure!

developer_response.body: Hey GMsupr! Thank you very much for the review! We're glad to hear that you enjoyed the game. Thanks for playing! =)

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and the art is also amazing and don’t get me started on the puzzle there tricky and easy one you get the hang of it but there are a few glitches here and the but overall it’s amazing 👌

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! We're glad you liked it!

reviews.review_description: Awesome puzzle experience. Took me a day or 2 to adjust my eyes to such a bright game. The narrative is a little dystopian as we go along. Definitely a suggested game- use the 25% code and it's only 11bucks!

developer_response.body:
Hey ShesMagickal_! 

Glad you liked the narrative of the game! Hope Webby behaved well! =)

Saving money is always a good thing! Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game! But I feel like this story isn’t quite done yet. There are things about this world that hasn’t really been explained, maybe these mysteries will be explained in a sequel or possibly prequel. Who knows? Anyway this is a great game and I hope we get more stuff like this!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We totally get your curiosity about the world—there’s definitely more to explore, and who knows what’s in store for the future 😉. We really appreciate your support!
